title: Lighting Bolt of Apollo
overview: Cleopatra confronts a playboy oil tycoon when he tries to woo a client's daughter by kidnapping her.

title: Crystal Pharaoh
overview: Cleopatra befriends a young girl carrying a diamond that many people are in pursuit of. What is the purpose of this diamond?

title: Pandora's Box
overview: Cleopatra takes in a young girl with immense psychic powers.
